name: PAY_FLOWS_SECURED_LIST_V
query: SELECT FLOW_ID, BASE_FLOW_ID, BASE_FLOW_NAME, LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, LEGISLATION_CODE, OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, MODULE_ID, CREATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, DEFAULT_FLOW_FLAG, ENTERPRISE_ID, LDG_RQD_FLAG, FORMULA_ID, START_SCH_TIME_DEF_ID, START_SCH_FORMULA_ID, SEED_DATA_SOURCE FROM PAY_FLOWS
